user_query: I'm hosting a movie night and I need some suggestions for movies to watch. Can you provide me with a list of the latest movies released from Disney and other platforms? Additionally, recommend some new anime shows that are popular among movie enthusiasts.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest movie releases from Disney, including release dates and genres.
required_inputs: Disney API for latest movie releases

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest movie releases from other streaming platforms (Netflix, Amazon Prime, etc.) with release dates and genres.
required_inputs: Streaming platforms API for latest movie releases

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest popular anime shows that are trending among movie enthusiasts.
required_inputs: Anime database API for trending shows
